glosses.en: to catch a cold; to get a cold

translations.en: I don't want to catch a cold.
translations.fr: Je ne veux pas attraper froid.
translations.vi: Tôi không muốn bị cảm lạnh.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (1st person singular, nominative) controlling agreement; the reflexive object will match this subject.
Finite modal auxiliary (present); selects the bare infinitive 'erkälten' and expresses volition.
Reflexive pronoun (1st person singular, accusative) required by the inherently reflexive verb 'erkälten'; core object coindexed with the subject.
Negation particle; negates the verb phrase headed by the infinitive under the modal.
Main verb (infinitive), inherently reflexive; complements the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Lisa möchte sich nach dem Sport nicht erkälten.
sentences.reading: /ˈliːza ˈmœçtə zɪç naːx deːm ʃpɔʁt nɪçt ɛɐ̯ˈkɛltən/

translations.de: Lisa möchte sich nach dem Sport nicht erkälten.
translations.ipa: /ˈliːza ˈmœçtə zɪç naːx deːm ʃpɔʁt nɪçt ɛɐ̯ˈkɛltən/
translations.en: Lisa doesn't want to catch a cold after working out.
translations.es: Lisa no quiere resfriarse después de entrenar.
translations.fr: Lisa ne veut pas attraper froid après le sport.
translations.it: Lisa non vuole prendere il raffreddore dopo l'allenamento.
translations.ko: 리사는 운동 후에 감기 걸리고 싶지 않아.
translations.zh-Hans: 丽莎不想在运动后感冒。
translations.ru: Лиза не хочет простудиться после тренировки.
translations.pt: Lisa não quer pegar um resfriado depois do treino.
translations.he: ליסה לא רוצה להצטנן אחרי האימון.
translations.vi: Lisa không muốn bị cảm lạnh sau khi tập.
translations.ar: ليزا لا تريد أن تُصاب بالزكام بعد التمرين.
translations.nl: Lisa wil na het sporten niet verkouden worden.
translations.uk: Ліза не хоче застудитися після тренування.
translations.hu: Lisa nem akar megfázni edzés után.
translations.hi: लीसा कसरत के बाद जुकाम नहीं पकड़ना चाहती.
translations.pl: Lisa nie chce się przeziębić po treningu.
translations.el: Η Λίζα δεν θέλει να κρυολογήσει μετά την προπόνηση.
translations.nb: Lisa vil ikke bli forkjølet etter trening.
translations.id: Lisa tidak mau masuk angin setelah olahraga.
translations.sv: Lisa vill inte bli förkyld efter träningen.
translations.ro: Lisa nu vrea să răcească după antrenament.
translations.da: Lisa vil ikke blive forkølet efter træning.
translations.fi: Lisa ei halua vilustua treenin jälkeen.
translations.ja: リサは運動の後に風邪をひきたくない。

tokens.explanation: Proper name, subject (3rd person singular, nominative).
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II form used for desire/politeness); selects the infinitive 'erkälten'.
Reflexive pronoun (3rd person singular, accusative) required by 'erkälten'; core object coindexed with 'Lisa'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP ('nach dem Sport').
Definite article (dative singular, masculine) required by 'nach' with 'Sport'.
Noun (masculine); object of the preposition 'nach' in the PP.
Negation particle; negates the verb phrase.
Main verb (infinitive), inherently reflexive; complements the modal 'möchte'.

sentences.target: Wir dürfen uns bei der Arbeit nicht erkälten.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈdʏʁfən ʊns baɪ deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪt nɪçt ɛɐ̯ˈkɛltən/

translations.de: Wir dürfen uns bei der Arbeit nicht erkälten.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈdʏʁfən ʊns baɪ deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪt nɪçt ɛɐ̯ˈkɛltən/
translations.en: We mustn't catch a cold at work.
translations.es: No debemos resfriarnos en el trabajo.
translations.fr: On ne doit pas attraper froid au travail.
translations.it: Non dobbiamo prenderci il raffreddore al lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在工作时不能感冒。
translations.yue: 我哋喺公司唔可以著涼。
translations.pt: Não devemos pegar um resfriado no trabalho.
translations.vi: Chúng ta không được bị cảm lạnh ở chỗ làm.
translations.ar: لا ينبغي أن نُصاب بالزكام في العمل.
translations.nl: We mogen op het werk nicht verkouden worden.
translations.uk: Нам не можна застуджуватися на роботі.
translations.hi: हमें काम पर जुकाम नहीं पकड़ना चाहिए.
translations.pl: Nie wolno nam się przeziębiać w pracy.
translations.el: Δεν πρέπει να κρυολογήσουμε στη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Vi må ikke bli forkjølet på jobb.
translations.id: Kita tidak boleh masuk angin di kantor.
translations.sv: Vi får inte bli förkylda på jobbet.
translations.ro: Nu avem voie să răcim la muncă.
translations.da: Vi må ikke blive forkølede på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 職場で風邪をひいてはいけない。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (1st person plural, nominative).
Modal auxiliary (present); selects the infinitive 'erkälten'. With 'nicht' expresses prohibition.
Reflexive pronoun (1st person plural, accusative) required by 'erkälten'; core object coindexed with 'Wir'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces locative PP ('bei der Arbeit').
Definite article (dative singular, feminine) agreeing with 'Arbeit' after 'bei'.
Noun (feminine); object of the preposition 'bei' in the PP.
Negation particle; negates the verb phrase under the modal 'dürfen'.
Main verb (infinitive), inherently reflexive; complements the modal 'dürfen'.

sentences.target: Niemand will sich auf der Reise erkälten.
sentences.reading: /ˈniːmant vɪl zɪç aʊf deːɐ̯ ˈʁaɪzə ɛɐ̯ˈkɛltən/

translations.de: Niemand will sich auf der Reise erkälten.
translations.ipa: /ˈniːmant vɪl zɪç aʊf deːɐ̯ ˈʁaɪzə ɛɐ̯ˈkɛltən/
translations.en: Nobody wants to catch a cold on the trip.
translations.es: Nadie quiere resfriarse durante el viaje.
translations.fr: Personne ne veut attraper froid pendant le voyage.
translations.it: Nessuno vuole prendere il raffreddore durante il viaggio.
translations.ko: 여행 중에는 아무도 감기 걸리고 싶지 않아.
translations.ru: Никто не хочет простудиться в поездке.
translations.pt: Ninguém quer pegar um resfriado na viagem.
translations.he: אף אחד לא רוצה להצטנן בנסיעה.
translations.vi: Không ai muốn bị cảm lạnh trong chuyến đi.
translations.ar: لا أحد يريد أن يُصاب بالزكام في الرحلة.
translations.nl: Niemand wil op reis verkouden worden.
translations.uk: Ніхто не хоче застудитися в подорожі.
translations.hu: Senki sem akar megfázni az utazás alatt.
translations.hi: यात्रा में कोई भी जुकाम नहीं पकड़ना चाहता.
translations.pl: Nikt nie chce się przeziębić w podróży.
translations.el: Κανείς δεν θέλει να κρυολογήσει στο ταξίδι.
translations.nb: Ingen vil bli forkjølet på reisen.
translations.id: Tidak ada yang mau masuk angin saat perjalanan.
translations.sv: Ingen vill bli förkyld på resan.
translations.ro: Nimeni nu vrea să răcească în călătorie.
translations.da: Ingen vil blive forkølet på rejsen.
translations.ja: 旅行中に誰も風邪をひきたくない。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite negative pronoun functioning as subject (singular, nominative).
Modal auxiliary (present); selects the infinitive 'erkälten' and expresses volition.
Reflexive pronoun (3rd person, accusative) required by 'erkälten'; core object coindexed with 'Niemand'.
Two-way preposition; here with dative indicates a static/temporal setting ('auf der Reise').
Definite article (dative singular, feminine) agreeing with 'Reise' after 'auf' in a static sense.
Noun (feminine); object of the preposition 'auf' in the PP.
Main verb (infinitive), inherently reflexive; complements the modal 'will'.

Lisa ne veut pas attraper froid après le sport.
On ne doit pas attraper froid au travail.
Personne ne veut attraper froid pendant le voyage.
